name: 17_negative_stop_regime
description: Negative stop_trigger_level regime (e.g., post-drawdown trailing stop). Verifies arithmetic is consistent in negative numbers.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: current_return -3.0 <= stop_trigger_level -2.5 - MAGNITUDE_FLOOR_PCT(0.10) = -2.60. -3.0 <= -2.60 is TRUE. MC: 45.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Condition met; new_count = 1 + 1 = 2; hit = (2 >= 3) is False. Catches an impl that flipped sign on the magnitude offset (e.g., stop_trigger_level + 0.10 instead of - 0.10) -- would compute threshold = -2.40 and -3.0 <= -2.40 still TRUE, so this fixture alone wouldn't catch the sign flip, but combined with fixture 14 (boundary, inclusive) the sign-flip impl would fail the boundary case.
